voice_chat.title: Voice Chat
voice_chat.empty: Tap the button and speak to start a conversation
voice_chat.error_mic_denied: Microphone access denied. Check your browser settings and allow microphone for this site.
voice_chat.error_mic_unavailable: No microphone found. Please connect a microphone and try again.
voice_chat.error_offline: You are offline. Check your internet connection.
voice_chat.voice_not_enabled: This agent does not support voice chat.
voice_chat.agent_not_found: Agent not found or voice not available
